raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Jurors can be reimbursed for using public transportation under AB 1981.",
    "AB 1981 creates a pilot program to increase juror compensation in California.",
    "The reimbursement options for jurors will result in more diverse juries that are reflective of communities.",
    "Allowing reimbursement for public transit will encourage greener travel options.",
    "Currently, California jurors are only reimbursed for traveling by passenger vehicles at the rate of $0.34 per mile.",
    "The low daily pay of $15 for California jurors compared to $50 for federal jurors creates financial hardship.",
    "Studies show that diverse groups deliberate longer and consider a wider range of information than homogeneous groups.",
    "The high cost of living in California makes it difficult for working families to make ends meet on the current juror compensation."
  ]
}
```
